global_context.scene_description: A cinematic editorial flat-lay or overhead shot on a clean light grey or near-white surface. The composition is split into two columns separated by a thin vertical line. Both columns occupy roughly the same vertical height, balanced visually. LEFT COLUMN: a stack of FOUR LARGE recognizable monthly subscription service cards arranged vertically with generous spacing between them, plus a TOTAL line below. The cards from top to bottom: (1) 'iPhone Plan $120/mo' card with a small iPhone silhouette icon, light grey/silver background. (2) 'NETFLIX $24.99/mo' card with deep red background and stylized 'N' shape. (3) 'DISNEY+ $24.99/mo' card with deep navy background and stylized castle silhouette. (4) 'SPOTIFY $11.99/mo' card with bright Spotify-green background and three stylized arc lines suggestive of Spotify wave logo. Below the four cards a clean total line: 'TOTAL: $180+/mo' in bold black. RIGHT COLUMN: a single TALL hero offer card that matches the full vertical height of the four-card subscription stack on the left. The right card is white with subtle drop shadow, rounded corners, and feels like a real product/financial offer card. Inside the card from top to bottom: (1) The actual ASH Cooling & Heating logo at the top, larger and prominent (use the supplied reference image). (2) A small grey letterspaced subhead reading 'NEW AC INSTALL'. (3) A small letterspaced label 'AS LOW AS' in dark grey, then directly below it the hero price in massive bold black: '$150/mo'. (4) A small grey label below the price: 'with 0% APR financing'. (5) A thin horizontal hairline separator. (6) Two clean offer rows side by side or stacked: a small green checkmark icon next to '0% APR FINANCING', and a small green checkmark icon next to 'PRICE MATCH GUARANTEE'. (7) Another thin horizontal hairline separator. (8) A footer trust band integrated into the card: a small shield-with-checkmark icon followed by bold uppercase text 'WE BEAT BIG NAME QUOTES', possibly on a subtle navy or red accent background strip. The whole right card looks like a polished financial product offer card, not a sticker collage. A center vertical thin separator line divides the two columns. At the top of the frame, a clean bold sans-serif headline reads: 'ARIZONA HOMEOWNERS: A NEW AC COSTS LESS THAN YOUR SUBSCRIPTIONS.' Small italic caption at bottom: 'New AC install. As low as $150/mo financing. 0% APR. Price match. We beat big name quotes.' Lighting: soft even editorial overhead, almost product photography. Mood: cold financial reframe with breathing space and editorial polish. Editorial product still life, NOT documentary photo, NOT cartoon, NOT a flat infographic, NOT a busy spreadsheet, NOT a sticker collage.

composition.framing: horizontal frame with two-column comparison, four-card subscription stack + TOTAL on left, single TALL hero offer card on right that matches the full vertical height of the left stack
composition.focal_point: the visual contrast between $180+/mo subscription total and $150/mo ASH price, anchored by the polished trust card on the right
